case_title: JESSICA HUNT VS. AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JESSICA HUNT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CARMEN ROBLES, OFFICE MANAGER. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNT, JESSICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED INC PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PLAINTIFF HAS NO VALID LEGAL CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,055.00 FILED BY AARDVARK STORAGE UNLIMITED INC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HUNT, JESSICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
